title: Iwata Asks Downloader
summary: This tool downloads the Iwata Asks series of interviews, saving as Markdown and HTML with images. ePub files are optional and can be generated in a secondary post-process phase. I created this tool in Spring/Summer 2019 so that I could more easily read and search the Iwata Asks interviews. More details: github.com/gingerbeardman/iwata-asks-downloader
content:
This tool downloads the Iwata Asks series of interviews, saving as Markdown and HTML with images. ePub files are optional and can be generated in a secondary post-process phase.

I created this tool in Spring/Summer 2019 so that I could more easily read and search the Iwata Asks interviews.

More details: github.com/gingerbeardman/iwata-asks-downloader
